title: Achievements
description: Removes advancements and returns the old achievements to the game
body:
# Achievements!
This data pack removes all vanilla **advancements** and replaces them with the old **achievements**, which were removed in Minecraft 1.12.

⚠️ **This data pack WILL remove all advancements you may have achieved in your world!**

If you want to bring back that little bit of nostalgia to the current version of the game, this is just the right pack for you!
